name: video-controller
description: Configurable keyboard controls for any HTML5 video: seek, adjust volume, theater mode, and per-domain auto-theater.

scripts.zip: rm -f video-controller.zip && zip -r video-controller.zip manifest.json content.js popup.html popup.js icons -x 'icons/icon.svg'
scripts.icons: rsvg-convert -w 16 -h 16 icons/icon.svg -o icons/icon-16.png && rsvg-convert -w 32 -h 32 icons/icon.svg -o icons/icon-32.png && rsvg-convert -w 48 -h 48 icons/icon.svg -o icons/icon-48.png && rsvg-convert -w 128 -h 128 icons/icon.svg -o icons/icon-128.png
